content.full_text:
12 April 1977

Francis Griener  
City Clerk  
801 N. 1st Street  
San Jose, California 95110

Dear Frank:

Thank you for your letter of March 21, 1977 concerning reporting requirements pursuant to Government Code Sections 87200, et seq.

The city council member need not report a loan exceeding $1,000 made to a friend or relative where there is no debt instrument as an investment as outlined in Section 82034. Repayment of the loan, however, must be reported as income pursuant to Section 82030 when payments total $250 or more if the payment is received from a person within the jurisdiction of the office.

Please let me know if you would like additional assistance or information.

Very truly yours,

Regina Siciliaoo-Kutchins  
Program Coordinator

RSK/gt

bcc: Jeanne P.
